_status: FINAL on 5/5 packs (compilation band; immersive format noted in _evidence_notes.md)

motion_mix.hand_float: up to 0.2 in recent videos (subtle handheld wobble)

grammar.cut_logic: cut on the VISUAL SUBJECT change mid-sentence, not on sentence ends
grammar.emphasis: runs of 2-3 micro-shots (0.8-1.2s) zooming a named object
grammar.holds: 20-45s single-scene holds during story peaks, camera drifts inside
grammar.transitions: hard cuts; fade only 2-4 times per video at act boundaries
grammar.sfx_density: sparse; music bed carries; stingers on segment starts and kills

styles: segment title card at each story start (chapters exist)
occasional label on a named object

grammar.segment_cards: typeset NUMBER card + name card at each story start; optional real historical art insert (ref-card)
grammar.mascot_open: mascot hosts the cold open on a flat void with presenter gestures

aaaflow_mapping.scene_grain: one scene per ~11 words keeps their cut rate at our default flow
aaaflow_mapping.animate_engine: none; parallax + Ken Burns carries static+zoom+drift mix
aaaflow_mapping.grade: warm or cinematic, NOT ember (that is Menagerie's)
